Related Entities

  • snf CYPRESS CARE CENTER 2-star, 180 beds
  • snf OSPREY POINT NURSING CENTER 5-star, 60 beds
  • snf CLUB HEALTHCARE AND REHABILITATION CENTER AT THE V 2-star, 68 beds
  • snf BUFFALO CROSSINGS HEALTHCARE & REHABILITATION CEN 5-star, 120 beds
  • condition Taking medicine to control high blood pressure among adults with high blood pressure Prevalence: 87.2%
  • condition Cancer (non-skin) or melanoma among adults Prevalence: 17.8%
  • condition Visits to doctor for routine checkup within the past year among adults Prevalence: 87.0%
  • condition Cholesterol screening among adults Prevalence: 93.3%
  • condition Colorectal cancer screening among adults aged 45–75 years Prevalence: 79.1%
  • condition High cholesterol among adults who have ever been screened Prevalence: 51.4%
  • condition Frequent mental distress among adults Prevalence: 11.5%
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-13. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026) CDC SDOH Measures for County (2017-2021)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
